channel.title: Canon Inc. — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by Canon Inc. (canon).

item.title: CVE-2026-6892 · 5.1 MEDIUM
item.description: Improper handling of symbolic links in the installer of CUPS Printer Driver for macOS(*) may allow a local attacker with login privileges to exploit a specially crafted symbolic link during installation to modify permissions of directories for which…

item.title: CVE-2026-6891 · 5.1 MEDIUM
item.description: Improper handling of symbolic links in the installer of My Image Garden for macOS Version 3.6.8 or earlier may allow a local attacker with login privileges to exploit a specially crafted symbolic link during installation to modify permissions of file…

item.title: CVE-2026-1789 · 6.9 MEDIUM
item.description: A vulnerability in the browser-based remote management interface may allow an administrator to access sensitive information on the device via crafted requests, affecting certain production printers and office/small office multifunction printers.

item.title: CVE-2026-1585 · 8.4 HIGH
item.description: An unquoted Windows service executable path vulnerability in IJ Scan Utility for Windows versions 1.1.2 through 1.5.0 may allow a local attacker to execute a malicious file with the privileges of the affected service.

item.title: CVE-2025-14237 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️
item.description: Buffer overflow in XPS font parse processing on Small Office Multifunction Printers and Laser Printers(*) which may allow an attacker on the network segment to trigger the affected product being unresponsive or to execute arbitrary code. *: Satera LB…

item.title: CVE-2025-14236 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️
item.description: Buffer overflow in Address Book attribute tag processing on Small Office Multifunction Printers(*) which may allow an attacker on the network segment to trigger the affected product being unresponsive or to execute arbitrary code. *: Satera LBP670C S…

item.title: CVE-2025-14235 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️
item.description: Buffer overflow in XPS font fpgm data processing on Small Office Multifunction Printers and Laser Printers(*) which may allow an attacker on the network segment to trigger the affected product being unresponsive or to execute arbitrary code. *: Sater…

item.title: CVE-2025-14234 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️
item.description: Buffer overflow in CPCA list processing on Small Office Multifunction Printers and Laser Printers(*) which may allow an attacker on the network segment to trigger the affected product being unresponsive or to execute arbitrary code. *: Satera LBP670C…

item.title: CVE-2025-14233 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️
item.description: Invalid free in CPCA file deletion processing on Small Office Multifunction Printers and Laser Printers(*) which may allow an attacker on the network segment to trigger the affected product being unresponsive or to execute arbitrary code. *: Satera L…

item.title: CVE-2025-14232 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️
item.description: Buffer overflow in XML processing of XPS file in Small Office Multifunction Printers and Laser Printers(*) which may allow an attacker on the network segment to trigger the affected product being unresponsive or to execute arbitrary code. *: Satera L…

item.title: CVE-2025-14231 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️
item.description: Buffer overflow in print job processing by WSD on Small Office Multifunction Printers and Laser Printers(*) which may allow an attacker on the network segment to trigger the affected product being unresponsive or to execute arbitrary code. *: Satera…

item.title: CVE-2025-7698 · 5.9 MEDIUM 🌩️
item.description: Out-of-bounds read vulnerabilities in print processing of Generic Plus PCL6 Printer Driver / Generic Plus UFR II Printer Driver / Generic Plus LIPS4 Printer Driver / Generic Plus LIPSLX Printer Driver / Generic Plus PS Printer Driver / UFRII LT Print…

item.title: CVE-2025-9904 · 6.9 MEDIUM 🌩️
item.description: Unallocated memory access vulnerability in print processing of Generic Plus PCL6 Printer Driver / Generic Plus UFR II Printer Driver / Generic Plus LIPS4 Printer Driver / Generic Plus LIPSLX Printer Driver / Generic Plus PS Printer Driver / UFRII LT…

item.title: CVE-2025-9903 · 5.9 MEDIUM 🌩️
item.description: Out-of-bounds write vulnerabilities in print processing of Generic Plus PCL6 Printer Driver / Generic Plus UFR II Printer Driver / Generic Plus LIPS4 Printer Driver / Generic Plus LIPSLX Printer Driver / Generic Plus PS Printer Driver / UFRII LT Prin…

item.title: CVE-2025-2146 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️
item.description: Buffer overflow in WebService Authentication processing of Small Office Multifunction Printers and Laser Printers(*) which may allow an attacker on the network segment to trigger the affected product being unresponsive or to execute arbitrary code. *…

item.title: CVE-2025-3079 · 8.7 HIGH
item.description: A passback vulnerability which relates to office/small office multifunction printers and laser printers.

item.title: CVE-2025-3078 · 8.7 HIGH
item.description: A passback vulnerability which relates to production printers and office multifunction printers.

item.title: CVE-2025-1268 · 9.4 CRITICAL 🌩️
item.description: Out-of-bounds vulnerability in EMF Recode processing of Generic Plus PCL6 Printer Driver / Generic Plus UFR II Printer Driver / Generic Plus LIPS4 Printer Driver / Generic Plus LIPSLX Printer Driver / Generic Plus PS Printer Driver / Generic FAX Prin…

item.title: CVE-2025-0236 · 5.3 MEDIUM 🌩️
item.description: Out-of-bounds vulnerability in slope processing during curve rendering in Generic PCL6 V4 Printer Driver / Generic UFR II V4 Printer Driver / Generic LIPSLX V4 Printer Driver.

item.title: CVE-2025-0235 · 5.3 MEDIUM 🌩️
item.description: Out-of-bounds vulnerability due to improper memory release during image rendering in Generic PCL6 V4 Printer Driver / Generic UFR II V4 Printer Driver / Generic LIPSLX V4 Printer Driver.

item.title: CVE-2025-0234 · 5.3 MEDIUM 🌩️
item.description: Out-of-bounds vulnerability in curve segmentation processing of Generic PCL6 V4 Printer Driver / Generic UFR II V4 Printer Driver / Generic LIPSLX V4 Printer Driver.

item.title: CVE-2024-12649 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️
item.description: Buffer overflow in XPS data font processing of Small Office Multifunction Printers and Laser Printers(*) which may allow an attacker on the network segment to trigger the affected product being unresponsive or to execute arbitrary code. *: Satera MF6…

item.description: Buffer overflow in CPCA font download processing of Small Office Multifunction Printers and Laser Printers(*) which may allow an attacker on the network segment to trigger the affected product being unresponsive or to execute arbitrary code. *: Sater…

item.description: Buffer overflow in identifier field of WSD probe request process of Small Office Multifunction Printers and Laser Printers(*) which may allow an attacker on the network segment to trigger the affected product being unresponsive or to execute arbitrar…

item.description: Buffer overflow in the Address Book username process in authentication of Mobile Device Function of Office Multifunction Printers and Laser Printers(*) which may allow an attacker on the network segment to trigger the affected product being unrespons…

item.description: Buffer overflow in the Address Book password process in authentication of Mobile Device Function of Office Multifunction Printers and Laser Printers(*) which may allow an attacker on the network segment to trigger the affected product being unrespons…

item.title: CVE-2023-0859 · 2.2 LOW
item.description: Arbitrary Files can be installed in the Setting Data Import function of Office / Small Office Multifunction Printers and Laser Printers(*). *:Satera LBP660C Series/LBP620C Series/MF740C Series/MF640C Series firmware Ver.11.04 and earlier sold in Japa…

item.title: CVE-2023-0858 · 3.1 LOW 🌩️
item.description: Improper Authentication of RemoteUI of Office / Small Office Multifunction Printers and Laser Printers(*) which may allow an attacker on the network segment to trigger unauthorized access to the product. *:Satera LBP660C Series/LBP620C Series/MF740C…

item.title: CVE-2023-0857 · 5.9 MEDIUM 🌩️
item.description: Unintentional change of settings during initial registration of system administrators which uses control protocols. The affected Office / Small Office Multifunction Printers and Laser Printers(*) may allow an attacker on the network segment to trigge…
